routes.description: Collaborative team memory and synthesis brain
routes.title: Relay

routes.description: What Relay is designed to do

content.intro: It exists for teams that need to remember together: capturing what happened, summarizing why it matters, and coordinating with trusted peer brains when work crosses boundaries.
points: Not a personal blog engine or portfolio shell.
A small public face for a larger private knowledge workflow.
content.title: Relay is a collaborative team-memory brain.
